classes.name: tests.release.test_changelog.FakeDate
documentation: Hackery to be able to patch date

methods.name: maintain.release.aggregate.AggregateReleaser.releasers
documentation: Returns all of the supported releasers.

methods.name: maintain.release.aggregate.AggregateReleaser.detected_releasers
documentation: Returns all of the releasers that are compatible with the project.

methods.name: maintain.release.aggregate.AggregateReleaser.check_version_consistency
documentation: Determine if any releasers have inconsistent versions

methods.name: maintain.release.c.CReleaser.version_headers
documentation: Returns all the version headers in the project.

methods.name: maintain.release.cocoapods.CocoaPodsReleaser.podspecs
documentation: Returns all the podspecs in the project.

functions.name: maintain.changelog.ast_to_headings
documentation: Walks AST and returns a list of headings

functions.name: maintain.commands.repo.gather_repositories
documentation:
Collects all of the repositories. The current implementation
searches for them in the current working directory.

functions.name: maintain.commands.repo.run
documentation:
Runs given command on all repos and checks status

    $ maintain repo run -- git checkout master

methods.name: maintain.release.base.Releaser.detect
documentation: Returns True when the Releaser detects the current project.

methods.name: maintain.release.base.Releaser.schema
documentation: Returns a schema for validating the configuration for the releaser.

methods.name: maintain.release.base.Releaser.determine_current_version
documentation: Called to determine the current version number.

methods.name: maintain.release.base.Releaser.determine_next_version
documentation: Called to determine the next version number.

methods.name: maintain.release.base.Releaser.bump
documentation:
Called to bump the version number in the project.
After called, `determine_current_version()` should return
the new version.

methods.name: maintain.release.base.Releaser.release
documentation:
This method is called to perform actual release actions
such as submission to a package manager.
